text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the spring Tenno Sho on the horizon and her
schedule as packed as ever, Symboli Rudolf
attends to another round of interviews.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the process, she announces the academy's first
"Mega" Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Air Groove's collapse, Symboli Rudolf
has been working like a person possessed to
reassure those around her that she can still be
relied upon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her answer to her own perceived shortcomings is
to work harder, run faster, and show the world
that the Emperor is flawless.
